case_title: ALVAREZ, MANUEL vs. NIEVES, CARLOS et al

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT NIEVES, CAMILA NIEVES, RAQUEL ESTEVA, JOSE HEARING SET FOR DEC-10-1999 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT NIEVES, CARLOS DEFENDANT CARLOS NIEVES IS AWARDED COSTS IN AN AMOUNT TO BE DETERMINED AFTER FILING OF COST BILL & HEARING ON MOTION TO TAX COSTS, IF ANY, & ATTORNEY FEES IN AN AMOUNT TO BE SET BY THE COURT AFTER FILING OF MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS FEES.
